hero.title: ILebhu ye-Innovation
hero.description: Phonononga iidemos ezisebenzisanayo, iimvavanyo, kunye nemiboniso yobuchwephesha evela kwiqela lethu lobunjineli.

hero.title: ILebhu ye-Innovation
hero.description: Siphonononga imida esebenzayo kwi-AI, i-automation, kunye neenkqubo ezisasaziweyo, emva koko siguqulele uphando oluqinisekisiweyo kwimveliso ethembekileyo.

researchAreas.title: Iindawo zophando
researchAreas.description: Indawo nganye ekugxilwe kuyo idibanisa uphando lokuhlola kunye neendlela zokuphunyezwa ezenzelwe iinkqubo zehlabathi lokwenyani.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Iinkcukacha ezimfutshane zokugxila
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Uphando lwexesha elisondeleyo ngoku lusuka kulwakhiwo lokuqinisekiswa ukuya kwizicwangciso zokuhambisa.

fromLabToProduction.title: Ukusuka kwiLebhu ukuya kwiMveliso
fromLabToProduction.description: I-Innovation kwi-Horizon ilinganiswa ngeziphumo ezithunyelweyo, hayi iiprototypes ezizodwa.

roadmap.title: Imephu ye-R &D
roadmap.description: Inkqubela phambili eqhubekayo ukusuka ekwakhiweni kwesakhono ukuya kwiinkqubo eziguquguqukayo, eziqhubekayo zokuphucula.

publications.title: Iimpapasho kunye nokuqonda
publications.description: Ukubhala ubuchwephesha kunye nokuphunyezwa kwamanqaku avela kumsebenzi oqhubekayo wokuphumla.

appliedAi.title: Iinkqubo ze-AI ezisetyenzisiweyo
appliedAi.description: Uyilo lwe-AI olujolise kwimveliso olubandakanya ukukhonza imodeli, i-orchestration yeempawu, kunye novavanyo olulawulwayo.

automationFrameworks.title: Izikhokelo ezizenzekelayo
automationFrameworks.description: Izixhobo ezizenzekelayo zangaphakathi zokhuseleko lokuhambisa, impendulo yeziganeko, kunye nokuphindaphinda kokuhamba komsebenzi wobunjineli.

advancedArchitecture.title: Uvavanyo loyilo oluqhubela phambili
advancedArchitecture.description: Uphando kwizakhiwo ezomeleleyo, ezisasaziweyo ezilungiselelwe ukusebenza, ukunyamezelana kwempazamo, kunye nesikali.

edgeAndIot.title: I-Edge Computing kunye nobukrelekrele be-IoT
edgeAndIot.description: Ubukrelekrele kumda wezigqibo ze-latency esezantsi, ukuqhubekeka kwe-telemetry, kunye nokulungelelaniswa kweenqanawa zesixhobo.

nlp.title: Inkqubo yoLwimi lweNdalo
nlp.description: Imibhobho yokuqonda iilwimi ezininzi zokuhlela, ukukhutshwa, ukuguqulela, kunye neenkqubo zengxoxo.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: I-Evolutionary Algorithms kunye nokuPhuculwa
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Iinkqubo zokukhangela kunye nokuphucula eziphefumlelwe kukhetho lwendalo ukusombulula imiceli mngeni yobunjineli obuphezulu.

automationFrameworks.title: Izikhokelo ezizenzekelayo
automationFrameworks.description: Sakha izikhokelo zokuhamba komsebenzi ezinokudityaniswa zokukhutshwa kwe-orchestration, amasango asemgangathweni, kunye nokuqinisekiswa kwe-post-deployment ukunciphisa ukungqubana ngesandla ngelixa kuphuculwa ukuthembeka.

advancedArchitecture.title: Uvavanyo loyilo oluqhubela phambili
advancedArchitecture.description: Iimvavanyo zethu zokwakha zijolise kwizicwangciso zokubola kwenkonzo, iipateni zokomelela ezinqamlezileyo, kunye neemvulophu zokusebenza kweenkqubo ezisebenza phantsi kwemfuno engaguquguqukiyo.

edgeAndIot.title: I-Edge Computing kunye nobukrelekrele be-IoT
edgeAndIot.description: Siqinisekisa ukusasazwa kweminyhadala kunye noyilo lwe-edge inference eyenza izigqibo ezikhawulezayo zendawo ngelixa sigcina ulawulo oluphakathi, uphicotho-zincwadi, kunye nolawulo lomjikelo wobomi.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Ukucwangciswa komthamo oguqukayo
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Iiprototypes zelebhu ziqinisekisiwe ngokuchasene nemithwalo yomsebenzi efanisiweyo kwaye emva koko zidityaniswe kwizicwangciso zokulinganisa ngokuzenzekelayo.

operationalIntelligence.title: Ubukrelekrele obusebenzayo
operationalIntelligence.description: Imibhobho ye-NLP isuka kwiimvavanyo ezilawulwayo ukuya kwinkxaso yemveliso yokuhamba komsebenzi ukukhawuleza kunye nokuqonda okucacileyo.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Ukuphuculwa kweenkqubo zokuhambisa
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Iindlela zokuziphendukela kwemvelo ezivavanywe elebhu ziguqulelwa kwiinjini zokuphucula ukucwangcisa kunye nokwabiwa.

edgeDecisioning.title: Isigqibo se-Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: I-IoT kunye novavanyo lwe-edge inference luqiniswe kwiinkonzo ezisezantsi ze-latency kunye nezithintelo ezingqongqo zokuthembeka.

now.title: Iziseko ze-AI ezisetyenzisiweyo
now.description: Yandisa iitemplate ezinokuphinda zisebenze imodeli, ii-suites zovavanyo, kunye nemigangatho yokujonga kumaqela emveliso.

next.title: Ukuhamba komsebenzi wobunjineli obuzimeleyo
next.description: Sebenzisa izikhokelo ezizenzekelayo ezinciphisa umngcipheko wokuthunyelwa kunye nokunciphisa ii-loops zempendulo zokuhambisa.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Ubukrelekrele bomthonyama
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Linganisa i-hybrid cloud-edge architectures yexesha lokwenyani kwiimeko ezibuthathaka ze-latency.

longHorizon.title: Iinkqubo zokuphucula eziqhubekayo
longHorizon.description: Hlanganisa uvavanyo, ukubeka iliso, kunye nokuphucula ukuze iinkqubo zikwazi ukuziqhelanisa ngokukhuselekileyo njengoko iimeko zitshintsha.

aiReliability.title: Iinkqubo ze-AI zobunjineli ezihlala zithembekile kwimveliso
aiReliability.summary: Umbono osebenzayo wokulinganisa isantya sovavanyo kunye nolawulo lwemveliso.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Iipateni zoyilo olusasaziweyo kumaqonga okukhula okuphezulu
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Amanqaku entsimi avela kwiimvavanyo zokwakha ezijolise ekusebenzeni, ukomelela, kunye nokusebenza ngokulula.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Imephu yendlela esetyenzisiweyo ye-R&D yeziphumo zoshishino
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Indlela esiyicwangcisa ngayo amaphulo okuvelisa izinto ezintsha ukuze ukufunyanwa kuhambe ukusuka kwiprototype ukuya kwixabiso elinokulinganiswa.

cta.title: Yakha ngeLebhu ye-Horizon Innovation
cta.description: Sebenzisana nathi ukuqinisekisa izimvo ezinamabhongo ngokukhawuleza kunye nokuhambisa iikhonsepthi eziqinisekisiweyo kwiinkqubo zemveliso ezikhuselekileyo, ezinokulinganiswa.

hero.title: Iinkqubo ze-AI ezisetyenzisiweyo
hero.description: Isishwankathelo esisebenzayo sendlela i-Horizon eyila ngayo, ihambisa, kwaye isebenze ngayo iinkqubo zokufunda ngomatshini ukusuka kwiprototype ukuya kwimveliso.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Imibhobho yokufunda ngomatshini
machineLearningPipelines.description: Imveliso ye-AI iqala ngemibhobho enokuphinda iveliswe edibanisa idatha, uvavanyo, ukuqinisekiswa kunye nengxelo.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Iipateni zokuhambisa imodeli
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Isicwangciso sokuhambisa sikhethwe ngokusekwe kwiimfuno ze-latency, ukugxeka kweshishini, kunye nokuntsonkotha kokusebenza.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Imodeli yokusebenza ye-MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Izenzo ze-MLOps ziqinisekisa ukuba iinkqubo ze-AI zihlala zithembekile, zilawulwa, kwaye zinokunyuka njengoko ukusetyenziswa kukhula.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Ukubeka iliso kunye nokuthembeka
monitoringAndReliability.description: Ukuqwalaselwa kuvala iluphu phakathi kokuziphatha kwemodeli kunye neziphumo zokusebenza.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Ugcino-lwazi kunye nobunjineli beempawu
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Ukungena kwedatha eguqulweyo, ukutshekishwa komgangatho, kunye neenkcazo zeempawu ezinokuphinda zisebenze zenze isiseko esithembekileyo soqeqesho lwemodeli.

modelDevelopment.title: Ukuphuhliswa kwemodeli
modelDevelopment.description: Iimvavanyo zilandelwa ngokucwangciswa okuphindaphindiweyo, iimetrikhi zenjongo, kunye neziseko zokuthelekisa ezizenzekelayo.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Ukuqinisekiswa kunye namasango okhuseleko
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Iimodeli zabagqatswa zidlula ukusebenza, ukomelela, kunye nokutshekishwa komgaqo-nkqubo ngaphambi kokuba zivunywe ukuba zikhutshwe.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Iiluphu zempendulo ezisebenzayo
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: I-telemetry yasemva kokuthunyelwa yazisa izinto eziphambili zoqeqesho kwakhona, izigqibo zokubuyisela umva, kunye nokucwangciswa kwe-iteration elandelayo.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Iinkonzo ze-Inference zexesha lokwenyani
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Ii-API ze-latency ezisezantsi zezicelo ezisebenzisanayo kunye ne-autoscaling, i-caching, kunye nokuqwalaselwa kwenqanaba lesicelo.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Uqikelelo lweBatch kunye nokuSasaza
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Imibhobho ecwangcisiweyo kunye neminyhadala yokufumana amanqaku aphezulu kuhlalutyo kunye nokuhamba komsebenzi.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Ukuhanjiswa kwe-Edge-Aware
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Iipateni zokukhonza ilifu le-hybrid kwiimeko ezifuna inference yendawo kunye nolawulo lwemodeli ephakathi.

ciCdForModels.title: I-CI / i-CD yeemodeli
ciCdForModels.description: Ukwakha ngokuzenzekelayo, ukuvavanya, kunye nokukhutshwa kokuhamba komsebenzi kunciphisa umngcipheko wokuthunyelwa ngelixa kugcinwa isantya sokuhambisa.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Irejista yemodeli kunye nomjikelo wobomi
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Iimodeli eziguqulweyo ezinamanqanaba okunyusa, umgca, kunye nokuvunywa komsebenzi kuphucula ulawulo kunye nokulandelela.

servingInfrastructure.title: Ukukhonza iziseko ezingundoqo
servingInfrastructure.description: I-Scalable Serving Layers kunye nezicwangciso zokukhutshwa ezinje nge-canary kunye nokuthunyelwa kwesithunzi zixhasa ulawulo olukhuselekileyo lotshintsho.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: I-Latency, i-Throughput, kunye nokulandela umkhondo weendleko
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Izilumkiso zokubuyiselwa kwedatha kunye nokulungiswa komsebenzi

cta.title: Linganisa i-AI esetyenzisiweyo ngokuzithemba
cta.description: Ukuba ucwangcisa amanyathelo e-AI afuna iziphumo ezinokulinganiswa kunye nokugcinwa kwexesha elide, i-Horizon inokunceda ukuyila kunye nokusebenza komjikelo wobomi benkqubo epheleleyo.

hero.title: I-NLP yeelwimi ezininzi
hero.description: Phonononga izakhono ezisebenzayo zokuqhubekeka kolwimi lwendalo kunye nendlela ezilinganisa ngayo kwiinkqubo zemveliso ezithembekileyo, zeelwimi ezininzi.

foundations.title: Iziseko ze-NLP
foundations.description: Ukuqhubekeka kolwimi lwendalo kudibanisa imiqondiso yolwimi kunye nokufunda ngomatshini ukukhupha intsingiselo, injongo, kunye nolwakhiwo kwisicatshulwa.

workbench.title: I-NLP Workbench esebenzisanayo
workbench.description: Sebenzisa idemo ukuvavanya ukufunyanwa kolwimi, amanqaku eemvakalelo, ukukhutshwa kwequmrhu, kunye nokuziphatha kokuguqulela ngexesha lokwenyani.

productionApplications.title: I-Horizon isebenzisa njani i-NLP kwimveliso
productionApplications.description: Amandla e-NLP adityaniswe kwimisebenzi yokusebenza kunye nokukhuselwa kokusebenza kunye neemetrikhi ezicacileyo zomgangatho.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Imigaqo yokuThembeka kunye noLawulo
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Imveliso ye-NLP ifuna ngaphezulu komgangatho wemodeli; Kuxhomekeka kwiinkqubo ezikhuselekileyo zokuhambisa kunye nokuqinisekiswa okuqhubekayo.

foundations.intro1: Iinkqubo ze-NLP zanamhlanje zamandla inkxaso yokuzenzekelayo, ukufaneleka kokukhangela, ukukhutshwa kolwazi, kunye nentsebenziswano yeelwimi ezininzi. Ukuphunyezwa okusebenzayo kufuna zombini umgangatho wemodeli kunye nolawulo oluqinileyo lokusebenza.
foundations.intro2: Kwi-Horizon, sigxile kwiinkqubo ze-NLP zokuphela ezidibanisa i-inference eyomeleleyo kunye nokujongwa, ulawulo, kunye nefuthe lemveliso elinokulinganiswa.

languageDetection.title: Ukufunyanwa kolwimi
languageDetection.description: Ichonga ulwimi oluvela kumacandelo okubhaliweyo amafutshane okanye amade ukuhambisa izicelo kumbhobho ofanelekileyo wokucwangcisa.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Uhlalutyo lweemvakalelo
sentimentAnalysis.description: Ikhupha injongo yeemvakalelo kunye ne-polarity yobukrelekrele babathengi, inkxaso yokuhlunga, kunye neengxelo zemveliso.

entityExtraction.title: Ukukhutshwa kwezinto ezikhoyo
entityExtraction.description: Ifumanisa amaqumrhu acwangcisiweyo afana namagama, iinkampani, iindawo, kunye nemihla evela kwisicatshulwa esingacwangciswanga.

translation.title: Inguqulelo
translation.description: Ixhasa ukuhamba komsebenzi kweelwimi ezininzi ngokuguqulela isicatshulwa esiveliswe ngumsebenzisi okanye esisebenzayo ngelixa ugcina umxholo.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Inkxaso kunye nobukrelekrele betikiti
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Yahlula izicelo ezingenayo ngokungxamisekileyo, injongo, kunye nemvakalelo ukukhawulezisa ukuhanjiswa kunye nomgangatho wempendulo.

governedContentOperations.title: Imisebenzi yomxholo olawulwayo
governedContentOperations.description: Sebenzisa iifilitha zolwimi ezinolwazi lomgaqo-nkqubo kunye nokutshekishwa kokumodareyitha ngokuchaneka okunokulinganiswa kunye neethagethi zokukhumbula.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Iingcebiso zoShishino eziQhutywa nguMbhalo
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Hlanganisa iindlela ezivela kumaxwebhu, uphononongo kunye nonxibelelwano ukwazisa isicwangciso-qhinga kunye nezigqibo zokusebenza.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Uvavanyo ngeTyala lokuSetyenziswa
evaluationByUseCase.description: Iimodeli zilinganiselwa ngokuchasene nedatha ethile yendawo ngaphambi kokuba kwenziwe izigqibo zokukhululwa.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Ukhuseleko loLuntu-kwi-Loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Uqikelelo lwempembelelo ephezulu lubandakanya iindlela zokuphononongwa, imigaqo yokunyuka, kunye neempawu zokuzithemba ezibonakalayo.

continuousMonitoring.title: Ukubeka iliso rhoqo
continuousMonitoring.description: I-Drift, i-latency, kunye nokuthotywa komgangatho kulandelwa ngokuqhubekayo ukuze uqeqesho kwakhona kunye nokubuyiselwa umva kuqhutywe.

hero.title: Imfaniso ye-algorithm yemfuza
hero.description: Phonononga ukubala kwendaleko kwindawo esebenzisanayo kwaye ubone ukuba imigaqo efanayo iguqulela njani kwiinkqubo zokuphucula imveliso.

scientificFoundation.title: Isiseko seNzululwazi
scientificFoundation.description: Ii-algorithms zemfuza ziindlela zokuphucula ezisekwe kubemi eziphefumlelwe kukhetho lwendalo kunye nokuziqhelanisa.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Imeko-bume ye-Evolution esebenzisanayo
interactiveEnvironment.description: Qhuba ukulinganisa ukuze ubone ukomelela kuphucula isizukulwana ngesizukulwana kwaye ubone indlela uxinzelelo lokukhetha oluchaphazela ngayo iziphumo.

productionUse.title: Indlela i-Horizon eyisebenzisa ngayo le nto kwimveliso
productionUse.description: Oomatshini bokukhangela abafanayo abasetyenziswe kule demo bazisa imibhobho yokuphucula efakwe kwiinkqubo zokusebenza.

applicationDomains.title: Imimandla yeNkqubo ebanzi
applicationDomains.description: Ukuphuculwa kwendaleko kubaluleke kakhulu kwiinkqubo ezineenjongo eziguqukayo kunye nezithintelo eziphikisanayo.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Endaweni yokukhangela isisombululo esinye ngexesha, i-algorithms yemfuza ivelisa inani elihlukeneyo labaviwa. Isizukulwana ngasinye sivavanywa ngokuchasene nomsebenzi wokuqina kwaye sihlaziywa ngokukhetha, ukuwela kunye nokuguqulwa.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Oku kubenza baphumelele kwiingxaki eziphezulu kunye nezithintelo ezingabonakaliyo, apho iindlela zokumisela ziba buthathaka okanye zibiza kakhulu.

selection.title: Ukhetho
selection.description: Abagqatswa abaphezulu kunokwenzeka ukuba basinde kwaye bachaphazele isizukulwana esilandelayo.

crossover.title: I-Crossover
crossover.description: Iimpawu eziqinileyo zidityaniswa kwakhona ukudala izisombululo ezintsha zomgqatswa kunye namandla axubeneyo.

mutation.title: Utshintsho
mutation.description: Ukungahleliwe okulawulwayo kuzisa iyantlukwano ukuze ukukhangela kungami malunga ne-optima yendawo.

convergence.title: Ukudibana
convergence.description: Kwizizukulwana ezininzi, abantu bathambekele kwizisombululo ezizinzileyo, ezikumgangatho ophezulu.

resourceScheduling.title: Ukucwangciswa kwezixhobo
resourceScheduling.description: Sisebenzisa izicwangciso zokuziphendukela kwemvelo ukwandisa ukucwangciswa kwezithintelo ezininzi apho ukukhangela kwamandla angenakwenzeka.

architectureTuning.title: Ulungelelwaniso loyilo
architectureTuning.description: Uqwalaselo lweziseko zophuhliso lwabagqatswa luvavanywa ngokuphindaphindiweyo ukuphucula ukusebenza kunye nokusebenza kweendleko.

continuousOptimization.title: Ukuphuculwa okuqhubekayo
continuousOptimization.description: Imisebenzi yokuphucula isebenza kwii-loops ezilawulwayo kunye nempendulo ye-telemetry ukuze iinkqubo zilungelelanise njengoko iiprofayili zemfuno zitshintsha.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Indlela kunye noCwangciso lweLogistics
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Ukuhanjiswa okuntsonkothileyo kunye nokucwangciswa kokuhambisa kuxhamla kuphando lokuziphendukela kwemvelo xa izithintelo zitshintsha ngokukhawuleza.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Imodeli kunye nokukhangela kwe-Hyperparameter
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Uphando lwemfuza lunokufumanisa ukucwangciswa kweemodeli ezikumgangatho ophezulu xa iindawo ezinenjongo zinengxolo kwaye zingabonakaliyo.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Iingxaki zePhothifoliyo kunye noLwabiwo
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Ukuphuculwa phantsi kweenjongo ezikhuphisanayo kunokuqulunqwa njenge-tradeoffs yokufaneleka kwiiseti zabagqatswa eziguqukayo.
